judgment.summary: High-growth potential is overshadowed by current unprofitability and a very high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 44.8%; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 441.7% — significant future growth expected.
Forward P/E 36.08x and PEG ratio 0.78 — suggests growth may justify the multiple if realized.
Total cash $439.70M and current ratio 3.83 — healthy liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin -8.6% and Profit margin -8.5% — currently loss-making.
Return on equity -6.1% and Return on assets -3.3% — poor profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-445.58M — significant cash burn.
Price/Sales (TTM) 27.25x — very high valuation relative to current sales.
Beta 3.76 — stock is highly volatile relative to the market.

news.paragraph: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) is seeing some mixed signals, with a headline noting AI leaders selling off while another highlights Mark Cuban's focus on foundational AI. The company's stock is trading at a high valuation, and while analyst estimates project significant future growth, recent performance indicates operational challenges. Traders should consider the broader market sentiment towards AI stocks and the company's own execution risks ahead of its August earnings report.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Iran Delay Saves Dow, But Sandisk, Bloom Energy, AI Leaders Sell Off
Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI): Mark Cuban Urges Focus on Foundational AI
Ambiq Micro (AMBQ) Reports Q1 2026 GAAP Net Sales of $25.1M
